description:
bw fails to open any git repository that has the worktreeconfig extension enabled:

```
error: open repo: core.repositoryformatversion does not support extension: worktreeconfig
```

This extension is standard git — it's automatically enabled when you use `git worktree add` and configure per-worktree settings. Any project that uses git worktrees with per-worktree config is completely unusable with bw.

## Reproduce

1. Create a repo with worktrees: `git worktree add ../foo`
2. Set any per-worktree config: `git config --worktree core.sparseCheckout true`
3. Run `bw list` — fails with the extension error

## Expected

bw should either support the worktreeconfig extension or ignore extensions it doesn't need to understand. The worktreeconfig extension just means "look for per-worktree config files" — it doesn't change the object format or anything bw cares about.

## Impact

Can't use bw at all from the Octopus project or any of its worktrees. Have to use `-C ../beadwork` workaround which can't see Octopus tickets.
title: Support git worktreeconfig extension in repo open
